hotkey.label: Summon Hotkey
hotkey.callNowHint: This app has a tray icon. You can open chat from the tray menu.
hotkey.captureDefaultHint: Click "Record Hotkey", then press a combo (e.g. Alt+·). Esc to cancel.
hotkey.captureNeedMainKeyHint: Press one non-modifier key as well.
hotkey.captureNeedModifierHint: Global hotkey requires at least one modifier (Ctrl/Alt/Shift/Meta).
hotkey.captureUnrecognizedHint: Key not recognized, please try again.
hotkey.conflict: Summon hotkey conflicts with record key. Keyboard record trigger will be disabled.
hotkey.backgroundWakeHint: Enable background voice wake (hold record hotkey)

api.deleteProviderConfirm: Delete provider "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
api.allowConcurrentRequestsHint: When disabled, all models under this provider will run serially.
api.linkHelperHint: Pick a common provider to generate a base URL template.
api.deepSeekKimiProtocolHint: This model name contains DeepSeek/Kimi. Use the DeepSeek / Kimi protocol.
api.maxOutputTokensHint: Controls the LLM's maximum output length. 4096 is recommended.
api.saveModelFirstHint: Model changed. Save the model first, then limits and capabilities will be updated from model metadata.
api.capabilityLimitedByModelHint: Some capability toggles are limited by the current model metadata.

migration.exportNotice: Data will be encrypted and marked with the current version (vX.X)
migration.importNotice: Import will preview and show API config increments
migration.passwordRule: Password is required and must be at least 6 characters.
migration.importUploadTitle: Click or drop a migration package
migration.importWarning: Current local config will be backed up before import. The app will restart after the migration is applied.
migration.previewSuccess: Preview finished. Please review the import summary.
migration.applySuccess: Migration applied. The app will restart now.

welcome.title: Welcome Setup Check
welcome.subtitle: These cards check whether your key settings are ready. Finish the required items first, then the recommended ones.
welcome.askLlmHint: If you are unsure how to configure something, just send a screenshot to the LLM and ask it to guide you step by step.

git.title: Git
git.summary: Git is required. Terminal workflows, Git Bash, and a lot of later development collaboration depend on it.
git.currentMissing: Git was not detected yet. Official download: https://git-scm.com/downloads

node.title: Node.js
node.summary: Node.js is required. Frontend development, many script tools, and later MCP / skill installation depend on it.
node.currentMissing: Node.js was not detected yet. Official download: https://nodejs.org/en/download

textModel.title: Available Text Model
textModel.summary: The app needs at least one working text model. A multimodal one is recommended.
textModel.currentOkMultimodal: A working multimodal text model was found: {name}
textModel.currentOk: A working text model was found: {name}. It is not multimodal yet.
textModel.currentMissing: No working text model was detected yet.
textModel.howToOk: If you also want screenshot-to-LLM workflows, add a text model with image capability.
textModel.howToMissing: Go to LLM, add a config, fill in base URL, API key, and model name, then make sure text is enabled.

assistantDepartment.title: Primary Department Model
assistantDepartment.summary: The primary department must have at least one driver model, otherwise the assistant cannot run normally.
assistantDepartment.currentOk: The primary department currently uses this model chain: {names}
assistantDepartment.currentMissing: The primary department does not have any usable driver model yet.
assistantDepartment.howToOk: You can add more fallback models to make the primary department more stable.
assistantDepartment.howToMissing: Go to Departments, select the primary department, and add at least one driver model.

voice.title: Speech Recognition
voice.summary: If you want voice input, this is a very worthwhile setup.
voice.currentOk: A speech recognition model was found: {name}
voice.currentMissing: No speech recognition model was detected yet.
voice.howToOk: You can now continue with record hotkey and auto-send settings.
voice.howToMissing: Go to LLM and add an STT config. Then select it in Chat settings as your speech model.

embedding.title: Embedding Model
embedding.summary: If you want stronger memory, retrieval, and recall, you should prepare an embedding model.
embedding.currentMissing: No embedding model was detected yet.

rerank.title: Rerank Model
rerank.summary: This helps the AI pick the most relevant items from a lot of information. It is a strong quality upgrade for search and memory, so it is strongly recommended.
rerank.currentMissing: No rerank model was detected yet.

memory.title: Memory
memory.summary: Memory helps the AI remember important things more reliably. After you prepare embedding and rerank, it is a good idea to finish the setup here.
memory.currentMissingModel: You have not prepared memory models yet. That is fine for now if you do not need memory yet.
memory.currentMissingBinding: You already have embedding or rerank models, but memory has not been fully turned on in the Memory page yet.

persona.title: Persona
persona.summary: Personas are different helper styles. You can make one for writing, one for execution, or one just for casual chatting.
persona.currentMissing: You do not have extra personas yet. The default assistant is enough to get started.

department.title: Department
department.summary: Departments are work groups. Later you can split collection, planning, and execution into different departments.
department.currentMissing: You do not have extra departments yet. Using only the primary department is totally fine.

skill.title: Skill
skill.summary: Skills are small how-to guides for the AI. If you are new, you can leave this empty for now and add them later.
skill.currentMissing: No skills were detected yet. That is okay for now.

mcp.title: MCP
mcp.summary: MCP connects extra outside tools or services to the AI. Beginners can safely skip this until they really need it.
mcp.currentMissing: No MCP services are enabled yet. That is not a problem.

tools.noChatLlmProvider: Chat LLM provider is not configured
tools.terminalProjectRootsPlaceholder:
One directory per line, e.g.:
D:\work\repo-a
E:\github\repo-b
tools.terminalProjectRootsHint: Terminal root switching is only allowed inside these directories and their subdirectories.
tools.terminalProjectRootsHelp: Common formats are auto-detected: Windows supports E:\repo, E:/repo, /e/repo; macOS/Linux supports ~/repo. Click "Save" to persist changes.
tools.gitRequiredHint: No supported shell was detected. Install Git first and use Git Bash.
tools.terminalRuntimeHint: On Windows, you can choose which shell exec uses. If no supported shell is available, install Git first: https://git-scm.com/downloads
tools.disabledHint: Tools are disabled for current chat LLM provider.
tools.imageCapabilityRequired: Image capability is required to enable screenshot/wait.
tools.desktopScreenshotDesc: Capture the full desktop once with one click.
tools.desktopWaitDesc: Wait once for the configured milliseconds.
tools.terminalSelfCheckDesc: Run a terminal self-check (pwd / git --version / bash --version).
tools.descFetch: Static webpage fetch tool. Fetch webpage content and extract readable text.
tools.descBingSearch: Run web search and return candidate results.
tools.descRemember: Remember key facts as long-term memory.
tools.descRecall: Recall related memory and return a memory board.
tools.descDesktopScreenshot: Capture the current full desktop image.
tools.descDesktopWait: Pause by milliseconds to control action pacing.
tools.descTerminalExec: Run one stateless terminal command in controlled workspace.
tools.descTerminalPathAccess: Set terminal root directory for current session (outside root is blocked).
tools.descReload: Reload MCP and skill from workspace.
tools.descOrganizeContext: Use only when the topic has drifted far and unrelated context may interfere with the latest task; do not compress when the chat is still short or context usage is still low.
tools.descTask: Manage the persistent task board: update, complete, and inspect tasks.
tools.descDelegate: Delegate work to another department: only the main assistant department can use it. mode=async runs in the background; mode=sync waits for the child result before continuing.
tools.workspaceHint: When no path is specified, exec runs in the main workspace. If no main workspace exists, it falls back to the assistant private workspace. Explicit absolute paths are allowed for reads, but unmatched absolute paths are denied for writes.
tools.workspaceLevelSystemHint: The assistant private workspace always exists and represents the default working directory chosen in settings.
tools.workspaceLevelMainHint: When no path is specified, terminal commands run here by default and writes use this permission.
tools.workspaceLevelSecondaryHint: Secondary workspaces are good for extra repos; permissions apply only when an explicit path matches here.
tools.keepOneMainWorkspace: Please keep at least one main workspace.
tools.workspaceAlreadyExists: This workspace already exists and cannot be added twice.
tools.privateWorkspaceReadonly: This persona is managed by private-workspace files, so tool toggles cannot be edited here.
tools.initializeWorkspaceConfirm: Initialize the shell workspace? This restores default skill templates and docs, and will not delete your existing directories or repositories.
tools.resetWorkspacePathDone: Workspace path restored to default: {path} (click Save to persist)
tools.resetWorkspaceConfirm: Restore the default preset files in the shell workspace? This will not delete your custom directories or repositories.
tools.systemCatalogReadonly: Edit department permissions in Department settings
tools.unassignedHint: This persona has not been assigned to any department yet, so only tool permissions can be edited.

persona.title: Persona
persona.name: Persona Name
persona.systemPlaceholder: I am the task/system coordinator persona used to display system messages.
persona.pasteImageHint: Supports Ctrl+V to paste image directly
persona.pasteNoImage: No image found in clipboard. Copy an image and try again.
persona.pasteReadFailed: Failed to read clipboard image. Please try again.
persona.privateWorkspaceAvatarReadonly: Private-workspace persona avatars are managed by the private workspace files and cannot be edited here.
persona.avatarTargetMissing: This persona is not stored in the main config data yet, so its avatar cannot be saved here right now.
persona.cropInitFailed: Cropper init failed: preview node not found.
persona.avatarSaveEncodeFailed: Failed to encode avatar image. Please try again.
persona.cropMissingTarget: Avatar target not found, please reselect.
persona.cropperNotReady: Cropper not ready, please reselect image.
persona.privateMemoryHint: When enabled, this persona can use private memory (and always has access to global memory)
persona.mustExportFirst: You must export first before confirming disable.
persona.exportedConfirmUnlock: After successful export, the "Confirm" button will be automatically unlocked.
persona.noPrivateMemorySafe: This persona has no private memory, it is safe to disable private memory. Confirm to disable?
persona.countFailedButCanClose: Failed to count memories, but private memory can still be disabled.

department.title: Department
department.hint: Departments are responsibility containers. The assistant department owns the main conversation, and other departments are for delegated work.
department.name: Department Name
department.modelFallbackHint: Tried from top to bottom. If the upper model fails, the next one is used automatically.
department.allowedModelsNote: Only models that support text conversations can be selected.
department.deputyToggleHint: Only deputy departments can receive delegated work. A deputy persona cannot also serve a non-deputy department.

validation.emptyName: Department name cannot be empty. Auto-save is paused.
validation.duplicateName: Department names must be unique. Auto-save is paused.
validation.invalidModel: Department "{name}" contains an invalid driver model. Please reselect it before auto-save resumes.
validation.missingAssistant: The primary department is missing. Restore it first.
validation.assistantNeedsModel: The primary department must have at least one driver model. Auto-save is paused.
validation.assistantCannotBeDeputy: The primary department cannot be a deputy department.
validation.deputyNeedsAssignee: Deputy departments must select one deputy persona.
validation.deputyBuiltinPersonaForbidden: The user persona and system persona cannot serve as deputies.
validation.deputyAgentConflict: A deputy department persona cannot also serve a non-deputy department.

department.summaryPlaceholder: Visible to the leader: what kind of work this department should receive.
department.guidePlaceholder: Visible to the department lead / workers: how this department should execute, report, and deliver.
department.guideHint: This content is only visible internally within the department
department.permissionHint: When enabled, this department filters builtin tools, skills, and MCP tools using whitelist or blacklist mode.
department.permissionModeBlacklistHint: Selected tools will be disabled for this department.
department.permissionModeWhitelistHint: Only selected tools will be available to this department.
department.permissionSkillsRequireExec: Skills require the terminal tool (exec) to be allowed first.
department.permissionDeputySkillsDisabled: Deputy departments cannot use preset Skills by default. User-created Skills still follow permission settings.
department.selectHint: Please select a department from the left

chatSettings.toolReviewApiHint:
Used to generate a safety assessment, command purpose, and review opinion before executing terminal commands that are not obviously safe.
A token-based model is recommended. Do not use a per-request priced model, because usage will be very small.
chatSettings.pdfReadModeHint: When set to Image, page images are only extracted if the selected model supports image input; otherwise it automatically falls back to text mode.
chatSettings.backgroundVoiceScreenshotKeywordsHint: Only applies to background voice activation. Matching any keyword triggers auto screenshot.
chatSettings.backgroundVoiceScreenshotModeHint: When a keyword matches, capture with this scope and attach to the current message.
chatSettings.instructionPresetsHint: Maintain short reusable instructions for the composer. They are attached to the current message as text blocks when sending.
chatSettings.instructionPresetPlaceholder: Enter a short instruction, e.g. Format the result as a table
chatSettings.cacheHint: Cache is namespaced by vision API config. Switching vision API uses its own cache namespace.

remoteIm.title: Contact Channels
remoteIm.hint: Manage OneBot v11 / Feishu / DingTalk channels and contact reply policies.
remoteIm.choosePlatform: Choose a platform for the new channel
remoteIm.empty: No channel yet. Add one first.
remoteIm.enableNeedDingtalkCredentials: Please fill DingTalk Client ID and Client Secret before enabling the channel.
remoteIm.enableNeedFeishuCredentials: Please fill appId and appSecret in Credentials (JSON) before enabling the channel.
remoteIm.contactsEmptyHint: Contacts are auto-created after receiving messages from enabled channels.
remoteIm.experimental: This feature is currently experimental and not supported

task.title: Task Board
task.subtitle: Inspect and maintain long-running tasks.
task.readonlyHint: Task detail is read-only, please use Task tool in chat to update.
task.selectHint: Select a task on the left.
task.discardConfirm: This task has unsaved changes. Close and discard them?
task.completedReadonlyHint: Completed tasks are currently view-only and cannot be edited again.
task.deleteConfirm: Delete this task? This action cannot be undone.

validation.everyMinutesPositive: Every Minutes must be a number greater than 0.

memory.vectorizationHint: Even without vectorization, you can still have a great recall experience
memory.importDone: Memory import completed: created {created}, merged {merged}, processed {total}
memory.importCardHint: Open the dialog, choose a unified memory backup JSON, preview scopes and sampled memories first, then map each scope to a target persona.
memory.importDialogHint: Choose a backup JSON first, verify the parsed result, then assign a target persona for each scope.
memory.importScopeMappingsHint: Each scope must be assigned to a target persona. Imported memories will be written as private memories of that persona.
memory.importNoSamples: No previewable memory samples were found in this file
memory.exportCardHint: Open the dialog, choose current internal memory scopes, then export them as a unified memory backup JSON.
memory.exportDialogHint: Choose which internal memory scopes to export before picking the save location.
memory.exportScopeHint: Only the checked memory scopes will be exported.
memory.exportNoScopes: No exportable memory scopes were found
memory.embeddingSyncSuccess: Embedding sync completed: added {added}, deleted {deleted}, total {batchCount} batches

mcpServerCard.configPlaceholder: Enter MCP JSON, for example with transport, command, and args fields

logs.title: Call Logs (Memory)
logs.hint: Only keep the last 10 send-receive logs, automatically cleared after process exits.

chat.maxConversations: Max 8 conversations, please archive old ones
chat.unarchivedConversationMemoryReminder: Reminder: unarchived conversations do not become memories. Archive or organize important content in time.
chat.conversationSearchPlaceholder: Search title or last two messages
chat.workspacePickerHint: Configure which directories the AI can access in this conversation. The default shell path is used when no path is specified.
chat.workspacePickerEmpty: No conversation workspace has been added yet. Add one to continue.

conversationMenu.title: Conversation Menu
conversationMenu.branchFromSelection: Select messages to create a branch

chat.newConversationTopicPlaceholder: Enter a topic for this conversation, or leave blank
chat.organizingContextDisabled: This conversation is organizing context in the background and cannot be switched right now.
chat.placeholder: Type your question, Ctrl+V to paste image, hold to speak
chat.forceArchiveTip: Choose compact or archive for the current chat
chat.archivingLock: Input is temporarily locked during this action
chat.branchingConversationDetail: Please wait while the new conversation branch is prepared.
chat.forwardingConversationSelectionDetail: Please wait while the selected messages are inserted into the target conversation.
chat.shareDialogMessage: {count} messages selected. Choose an export format.
chat.shareDialogHint: HTML exports a standalone static history page, while image exports a long screenshot of the selected messages.
chat.copyFailed: Copy failed. Please check clipboard permissions and try again.

plan.confirmHint: If you disagree, just tell me your thoughts.

supervision.buttonTitle: Create a timed repeating task to keep this conversation moving
supervision.activeButtonTitle: This conversation already has an active focus task. Click to inspect or overwrite it
supervision.buttonHint: Create a timed immediate task bound to this conversation and keep supervision active during its lifetime
supervision.subtitle: Create a timed immediate task bound to this conversation so the system keeps supervising during the active window.
supervision.activeHint: This conversation already has an active focus task ending at {endAt}. You can overwrite it directly.
supervision.goalPlaceholder: Describe what must be pushed forward in this window
supervision.whyPlaceholder: Why does this need active supervision right now?
supervision.todoPlaceholder: Describe how you will push this forward, focusing on the next step
supervision.noConversation: No conversation is available for a focus task.

toolReview.title: Tool Review
toolReview.empty: No reviewable terminal or patch changes are available yet.
toolReview.customDialogHint: Describe the target you want the sub-agent to review.
toolReview.customDialogPlaceholder: e.g. Review only the recent window switching refactor
toolReview.reportUnavailable: No review report is available yet.
toolReview.reportPending: Submit review will first review any unreviewed tools in this batch.
toolReview.reviewUnavailable: No assessment opinion has been generated yet.

status.saveConfigBackend404: Save failed: backend command not reachable (404). Please run `pnpm tauri dev`.
status.saveConfigDialogHint: You can switch to another key combo in the Hotkey tab and try again.
status.saveConfigHotkeyOccupied: Save failed: hotkey {hotkey} is already used by another app.
status.personaUnsavedSwitchHint: Persona "{name}" has unsaved changes. You still need to save it manually after switching.
status.departmentUnsavedSwitchHint: Department "{name}" has unsaved changes. You still need to save it manually after switching.
status.saveConversationLlmFailed: Save conversation LLM provider settings failed: {err}
status.loadConversationActionPreviewFailed: Failed to load conversation action preview: {err}
status.conversationActionNoTarget: No valid chat LLM provider/persona is selected, cannot process the current conversation.
status.conversationActionInProgress: A conversation action is already running, please wait.
status.conversationActionBusy: Chat generation is in progress, please try again later.
status.conversationActionConflict: Active conversation changed. Please retry this action.
status.forceArchiveNoTarget: No valid chat LLM provider/persona is selected, cannot force archive now.
status.forceArchiveInProgress: Force archive is already running, please wait.
status.forceArchiveBusy: Chat generation is in progress, please force archive later.
status.forceArchiveConflict: Active conversation changed. Please retry force archive.
status.requestRateLimited: Too many requests. Please try again later or switch models.
status.requestServiceUnavailable: The model service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
status.requestUnauthorized: Authentication failed. Please check your API key or account permissions.
status.requestForbidden: The request was rejected. Please check account permissions or service restrictions.
status.requestTimedOut: The request timed out. Please try again later or switch models.
status.requestNetworkError: Network request failed. Please check your connection or proxy settings.
status.requestModelUnavailable: The selected model is unavailable. Please check the model name or switch models.
status.requestContextTooLong: The current context is too long. Please compact the conversation or shorten the input and try again.
status.requestInsufficientBalance: The account balance is insufficient or the quota has been exhausted. Please check billing and quota.
status.requestServiceMaintenance: The service is under maintenance or temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
status.importArchiveDone: Archive import finished: added {imported}, replaced {replaced}, total {total}.
status.recordUnsupported: Recording is not supported in this environment.
status.speechUnsupported: Local speech recognition is not supported in this environment.
status.recordAutoStopped: Recording reached limit {seconds}s and stopped automatically.
status.terminalApprovalQueueHint: {count} terminal approval request(s) are still waiting.

archives.importPreviewHint: Replacement is matched by archiveId and cannot be undone.
archives.deleteConfirm: Delete this archive? This action cannot be undone.
archives.deleteUnarchivedConfirm: Delete this unarchived conversation? This action cannot be undone.
archives.organizingContextDisabled: Background archive in progress; switching is temporarily disabled.

appearance.themeBuilderSummary: Keep preset themes for quick switching, and add a low-friction custom generator for live theme synthesis.
appearance.customThemeSummary: {mode} mode - click to switch to this theme
appearance.customThemeHint: Changes preview instantly and stay in sync across windows.

about.updateAvailableAction: New version {version} is available. Click to update
about.updateReadyAction: Update {version} has finished downloading. Click to update and restart
